title: Denise's Lots O' Meat Lasagna
description: A hearty, meat-loaded lasagna with ground chuck and Italian sausage in a rich tomato sauce, layered with a cottage-cheese-and-Parmesan filling and oven-ready noodles.

items: 1 (14.5-ounce) can diced tomatoes with basil, garlic, and oregano

instructions: In a large saucepan, combine ground chuck, sausage, onion, and garlic. Cook over medium heat until meat is browned and crumbled; drain.
Return meat to the pan and add the tomato sauce and next 6 ingredients. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer 30 minutes.
In a small bowl, combine cottage cheese, Parmesan, parsley, and eggs.
Spoon one-fourth of the sauce into the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch baking pan. Place 3 uncooked lasagna noodles on top of the sauce; do not overlap noodles.
Spread one-third of the cottage cheese mixture over the noodles, top with one-fourth of the sauce and one-third of the mozzarella. Repeat layers, ending with sauce, reserving one-third of the cheese.
Bake 45 minutes. Top with remaining cheese and bake 15 minutes, or until hot and bubbly. Let rest 10 minutes before serving.
